# {{ site.first_name }} {{ site.last_name }} &mdash; full Markdown corpus

## Headline facts (canonical)

- **Name:** Ronak Pradhan
- **Role:** Applied Scientist (LLMs &amp; applied ML in production)
- **Currently:** Data Scientist Intern at Optum (January 2024 &mdash; present)
- **Previously:** Applied Scientist Intern at Amazon (February &mdash; July 2023)
- **Education:** B.Tech in Electronics &amp; Communication Engineering, Manipal Institute of Technology (September 2023)
- **Core stack:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace `transformers` + `peft`, BioClinical BERT, GANs, PySpark, SQL, AWS SageMaker (sync &amp; async endpoints), Docker, Flask, AWS Lambda
- **Quantified impact at Amazon (Feb&ndash;Jul 2023):** +0.4% Precision @ 1% Recall, +0.2% ROC AUC, +0.4% Cold-Start ROC AUC on the `Amazon.in` product-purchase ranking model, trained on 100M+ rows / terabyte-scale behavioral data.
- **Quantified impact at Optum (Jan 2024&ndash;present):** Significantly improved precision on a healthcare textual-entailment task by domain-adapting BioClinical BERT with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT); shipped a productionized asynchronous SageMaker endpoint for clinical-document inference.
- **GitHub:** [github.com/Ronak-Pradhan](https://github.com/Ronak-Pradhan)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/ronak-pradhan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ronak-pradhan/)

## How to hire Ronak

The fastest way to start a conversation is the [contact form]({{ '/contact/' | absolute_url }}) on this site or a 20-minute Calendly intro call. Open to:

- Full-time Applied Scientist / Research Engineer / ML Engineer roles working on LLMs or applied ML in production.
- Consulting engagements of 4&ndash;12 weeks where production-quality ML matters &mdash; setting up evals, fine-tuning a model, unblocking a stuck production system.
- Collaborations on open-source LLM tooling, evals, or healthcare-focused ML.
